reviews.review_title: Does not load on my meta quest 3
reviews.review_description: I have played it a bit and it’s pretty good. I just wish they would change a few things including the updates.

On behalf of the MageCosmos team, we would like to express our deepest  gratitude to all of our early players who have supported us throughout  our journey in creating this VR social gaming platform. Our team is made  up of passionate VR enthusiasts who have worked tirelessly to bring  this platform to life. We recognize that none of this would have been  possible without your early support, and we are honored to have you as  part of our community. We will continue to strive to provide you with  the best possible VR social gaming experience, and we look forward to  sharing many more exciting moments with you on MageCosmos. Thank you  again for your support, and we hope to continue growing together.
Would be great to see the potential about AI agents
Nice game with big potential, enjoy the farm sim though there are few people. 5 stars for the great concept!
Hi Dev can you add locomotion please I really think it will b great and more worlds, people wandering around and cars passing by in the cities? Thank u

developer_response.body:
Hi Aaron, thanks for the feedback! Welcome to join our discord(https://discord.gg/qbpjdXd3Uh) and we'd love to hear more from you !! Yeah we're working on the locomotion and more lifelike experience in our「world exploration」room.

World exploration is the most important module of MageCosmos, At the moment, it looks more like a chat room with different scenes, but as you can see, we are not just building it as a chat room —— We added some interesting elements. For example, you can find Spiderman bracelets in American central park, and fly around the city like Spiderman. In Chinatown, you can pick up weapons and interact with friends and you can take photos with cute anime girls on the streets of Japan.

In addition to these, we are trying to add story-like experience in these chat room

reviews.review_description:
Could have been great if people still played it.
No one ever plays it anymore.
The only things you can do solo are avatar customization,
and tossing the basketballs in the lobby.

developer_response.body: Hey dude, we have DEVELOPER FACE TO FACE event on every Thursday 9:00~10:00am (Beijing Time), and we also have team members online everyday from now, thanks for the feedback and we're looking forward to meeting you in MageCosmos !

reviews.review_description: I've been testing and playing this since it was a dorm, an island, and 1 game. I'm very proud of the work I've seen go into the game and that they're actually making a community and seem to truly care about making the game better.

developer_response.body: Big thanks to you Pink, and it's been our pleasure to build this with you together !

reviews.review_description:
Not sure what this game is.  Haven’t been able to find anyone playing on it. The one game I saw that was a castle defend type game was ok but buggy. 

Potential….Keep your eye on this.

reviews.review_title: A bit weird but has good intentions
reviews.review_description:
Video review: https://youtu.be/OtEHAEgxEnw

It isn't made clear but there is a lot of Chinese text in this game, so it sometimes feels like trial and error when you're attempting to progress early on, but once you get to the English then the purpose of the game becomes a lot more clear. It didn't serve much function to me as a native speaker, but I can see how it could be helpful for those studying English as a second language, so I'm not going to be too harsh!

developer_response.body:
Hi Ballsy,

Thank you for making this video about your experience in our demo! Your feedback is very helpful to us and we value your opinion a lot! Indeed, our whole team is watching your video right now to learn from your feedback and making plans to address them. As we will soon launch the Alpha version of MageCosmos (next month if the app lab review process is going well). And it would be ALL ENGLISH VERSION lol, we'd like to invite you to our discord #MageCosmos (https://discord.gg/GhxKgMFR) and hear more from you!

Again really appreciate your time playing with our demo!
Haopeng

reviews.review_title: Looks really promising, but can't access
reviews.review_description: The game looks super promising, and the artwork and idea behind the game makes me tear up from how beautiful they are, but I'm sad that for some reason, it seems to take a long time to log in, but I don't know why.

developer_response.body: hi there, we're grateful for the support and we have fixed this issue, you should be able to have access to the game! And you're welcomed to join our discord so we can chat with you: https://discord.com/invite/magecosmos-841876916227014656

reviews.review_description: I can't figure out how to get past the start of the game or get into the game world I think a guide will help.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your feedback. Please see the basic instruction guide via: https://youtu.be/pQSZUfZcPbg

We apologize the current Alpha Version has not added the tutorial.
In below, there are some tips:
- You can use your hands (controllers) to touch the button to enter "Game Space" on the Door. Or you can use your left hand to press the watch button on your left hand. 
- Since you are in the Game Space Hub, you can get into the game by teleport in front of the door. And then use your hand to touch through the door. 
- You can press the "A" button twice to go back.

And we encourage you to join our Discord channel to share more feedback to help us to iterate the product features: https://discord.gg/EQGM7phCKv

Really appreciate it again, and hopefully, MageCosmos can bring the new experience to you.

reviews.review_description: discover something new each time i play it
Not my type of gameplay! Not my cup of tea!

developer_response.body: hi there, we're very sorry for the inconvenience! We have fixed this issue and you're now good to go! You can also welcomed to join our discord for further help: https://discord.com/invite/magecosmos-841876916227014656

reviews.review_title: Great game platform and huge potential!
reviews.review_description: its so much fun. People are for the most part very nice fun to play with.

When I saw the trailer for this game I wasn't sure about it, but I thought I would give it a try anyways.. Glad I didn't make the decision to bypass this one based on what I saw in the trailer. New to VR/Quest (just little over a month now), but this game is impressive. My only issue is that since this game just be launched for about 2 months, there are not so many players in it so sometimes I cannot complete the tasks. But I'm glad their developers are friendly and helpful, and they would like to play it with me. Can't wait to see the future development of this one!

reviews.review_title: It's worth to spend time on it!
reviews.review_description: Hope more people can join at the same time.
